fixture: fixtures/state: a Board with white text (#FFFFFF) on a light gray fill (#CCCCCC) and a 20x20 icon button

must_detect: the #FFFFFF-on-#CCCCCC text as a 1.4.3 contrast failure (ratio < 4.5:1)
the 20x20 interactive target as below the 24x24 (2.5.8) threshold
must_not: claiming a pass without computing the ratio

pass_criteria: Report lists both issues with severity, computed ratio, required threshold, a concrete fix, and confidence; no canvas mutation occurs.
